name: Vegetable-Bulgur Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook chopped onion, celery, mushrooms, and garlic in hot oil about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender but not brown.
2. Stir in sliced carrots, zucchini, chicken/beef/vegetable broth, red/green pepper strips, bulgur, dried tarragon, and salt.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 8 to 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender. Makes 4 servings.
4. Food Exchanges per serving: 1 vegetable exchange
5. Substitute quinoa for bulgur if desired.
